privacyContent.title: 1. Introduction
privacyContent.body:
PsikoPlanner is a professional practice management application designed for therapists. This privacy policy describes the data the application collects, stores, and processes.

Developer: PsikoPlanner
Contact: psikoplanner@gmail.com

privacyContent.title: 2. Data We Collect
privacyContent.body:
Account Data: Email address (for login and registration)

Client Personal Data: Name, phone, email, date of birth, gender, national ID, nationality, occupation, marital status, education level, address, emergency contact information

Health Data (Sensitive): Chronic illness information, current medications, allergy information, medical history

Psychological Data (Sensitive): Previous diagnoses and treatments, trauma history, family psychiatric history, therapy expectations

Session Data: Session dates, types, notes (SOAP format), evaluations

Financial Data: Session fees, payment status (credit card/bank info is NOT collected)

privacyContent.title: 3. Data Storage
privacyContent.body:
Client data (health, psychological, session, personal): Stored entirely on your device locally using SQLite database. This data is never sent to any server and never leaves your device.

Authentication data: Email and session tokens are processed through Supabase.

Sensitive credentials: Stored in the device's secure enclave (Secure Store).

privacyContent.title: 4. Data Sharing
privacyContent.body: We do not share your client data with any third party. The application contains no advertising SDKs, analytics tools, or tracking technologies. Health and therapy data never leaves your device. The only external connection is Supabase for authentication (email/password only).

privacyContent.title: 5. User Rights (KVKK / GDPR)
privacyContent.body:
Under the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) and GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Right of access: You may request access to your data.
• Right to rectification: You may request correction of inaccurate data.
• Right to erasure: You may request deletion of all your data.
• Right to portability: You may export your data using the backup feature.
• Right to object: You may object to data processing.
• Right to withdraw consent: You may withdraw your consent at any time.

To exercise these rights, contact psikoplanner@gmail.com.

privacyContent.title: 6. Security Measures
privacyContent.body:
• Local data storage (no cloud synchronization)
• Biometric authentication (fingerprint / face recognition)
• Auto-lock feature
• Secure credential storage (Secure Store)
• HTTPS for all network communications
